name: HP EliteBook / ProBook / Z-series BIOS family
description: HP's `HPQ' firmware uses an ASCII CRTM_VERSION of the form `<release-id> Ver. 01.<major>.<minor>' or similar. Appears as UTF-8 in PCR 0's EV_S_CRTM_VERSION.
platforms-note: HP's platform identification (EliteBook vs ProBook vs Z-workstation) is in SMBIOS, not CRTM. The CRTM string encodes the firmware release family.
notes: HP's vendor EK root CA is the `HP TPM 2.0 Endorsement Key Root CA'. HP publishes it via their HP TPM Provisioning tool; it is also available as part of Microsoft's tpm-toolbox defaults. HP BIOS typically measures EV_EFI_VARIABLE_DRIVER_CONFIG + EV_EFI_VARIABLE_AUTHORITY on PCR 7 for Secure Boot db/dbx.
source: HP BIOS release notes + public community disassemblies of HP firmware (HPQFlash).
